name: Silhouette (Naked)
description: Silhouette (Naked) is the public-ledger trading path for Silhouette’s Hyperliquid interface: in naked mode, orders route directly to Hyperliquid’s order book via builder codes, with wallet, size, and intent visible on-chain like other Hyperliquid frontends. The same app at silhouette.exchange lets you choose naked or shielded per trade; naked supports spot and perpetuals with market and limit orders, while shielded spot uses Silhouette’s confidential execution layer.
